---
name: Technical debt
about: Pay down debt or improve maintainability while aligning to roadmap tracks
labels: []
title: "[TechDebt]: "
---

## Problem
_What maintenance burden or risk exists today? Reference concrete files (e.g., `internal/store/...`)._

## Outcome
_Desired state after the debt item ships._

## Scope
- **In**: _Code/tests/docs to touch._
- **Out**: _Related cleanups deferred for later._

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] _Objective signals that the debt item is resolved (lint passes, coverage, etc.)._

## Dependencies
_Other issues, migrations, or sequencing constraints._

## Risks & mitigation
_Include regression, rollout, and coordination concerns._

## Estimation
- Size: ☐ S ☐ M ☐ L
- Target phase: ☐ Near-term (0–6 w) ☐ Mid-term (6–12 w) ☐ Later (12+ w)
- Track: ☐ Delivery ☐ API ☐ Data ☐ Ops ☐ Security ☐ UX ☐ Docs
- Labels applied: `phase:<value>`, `track:<value>`, `size:<value>`

## RICE inputs (optional)
- Reach:
- Impact:
- Confidence (0–1):
- Effort (person-weeks):

## Owner
_Assignee or team._

## Testing & validation plan
_List automated commands (e.g., `go test ./...`, `npm run docs:lint`) and manual checks._

## Documentation updates
_Detail any README/docs/CHANGELOG impacts._
